# fmc_intrusion_rules (Data Source)

This data source reads the Intrusion Rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fmc_intrusion_rules" "example" {
  items = {
    "my_intrusion_rules" = {
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `domain` (String) Name of the FMC domain
- `items` (Attributes Map) 'Map of Intrusion Rules. The key of the map is the name of the individual Intrusion Rule. Use the name in gid:sid format (eg. 2000:10000301).' (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Id of the object

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Id of the Intrusion Rule object.
- `rule_data` (String) Snort formated rule data.
- `rule_groups` (Attributes List) List of Intrusion Rule Groups this rule belongs to. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--rule_groups))
- `type` (String) Type of the object; this value is always 'IntrusionRule'.

<a id="nestedatt--items--rule_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.rule_groups`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Id of the Intrusion Rule Group.
- `name` (String) Name of the Intrusion Rule Group.
